prompt: Ultra-detailed cinematic cyber-grunge fashion poster of a young man walking confidently toward the camera, centered in frame, full-body composition, intense eyes, soft masculine facial structure, messy wind-swept dark brown hair, subtle stubble, pale skin tone, neutral expression, dramatic editorial lighting. He wears layered black techwear fashion: distressed oversized trench coat with torn edges and flowing fabric motion, heavy draped scarf around neck, oversized black shirt, tactical cargo pants with straps and stitched textures, black leather combat boots, crossbody utility strap, futuristic dystopian styling. Poster aesthetic inspired by avant-garde streetwear campaigns, luxury fashion editorials, neo-Tokyo cyberpunk minimalism, monochrome visual identity, dark moody atmosphere, high contrast black and white palette. Background split vertically into two contrasting halves: Left side: textured off-white concrete wall with grunge paper texture, ink splatters, paint drips, abstract geometric diagrams, thin technical lines, circles, symbols, barcode graphics, minimalist UI-inspired design elements, subtle distressed typography layout. Right side: deep matte black background with smoky haze, cinematic fog, soft atmospheric dust, shadow gradients, minimal texture. Typography integrated naturally into the poster design in English, Korean, and Japanese: Large vertical Japanese kanji typography on right side with rough painted texture, small vertical Japanese quote beside character, Korean phrases placed in lower left and lower right corners, bold English headline text in upper left: “BEYOND THE SHADOW” “I WALK ALONE, BUT I CARRY EVERY VERSION OF MYSELF.” Additional tiny editorial text, coordinates, symbols, futuristic labels, and graphic interface elements scattered subtly across composition. Floor is glossy black with wet reflective texture reflecting the boots and coat movement. Coat fabric flows dynamically as if blown by wind. Composition feels like a premium fashion campaign poster mixed with dystopian anime aesthetics and underground streetwear branding. Ultra-realistic photography, hyper detailed skin texture, cinematic shadows, volumetric smoke, sharp focus, luxury magazine quality, dramatic depth, 8K detail, high-fashion editorial look, realistic fabric physics, perfectly balanced negative space, clean typography hierarchy, sophisticated graphic design composition, poster-ready layout, vertical 4:5 aspect ratio.
